what_it_does: An IIFE that defines window.cvAIPresets, a localStorage-backed, observable store for AI Studio image presets and pipelines. Presets are named reusable GenerateOptions blobs (prompt body, model, size, quality, format, compression, background, moderation, n); pipelines are ordered step sequences (generate/edit/mask/filter/adopt) that operate on an image. Ships six seed presets and two seed pipelines, exposes CRUD (add/update/remove for presets and pipelines), snapshot/subscribe, findPreset, and materialize (resolve a preset into a GenerateOptions object for cvOpenAI.generateImage).
observations: SEED includes 6 presets (warm interior, drone exterior, bronze line, stone texture, stakeholder portrait, moodboard) and 2 pipelines (hero+close-up pack, project listing kit)
All seed presets use model 'gpt-image-2' with concrete ConceptV-branded prompt bodies (Australian property/architecture, warm/gold/ink palette)
load() returns a deep clone of SEED when storage is empty or unparseable, merging presets/pipelines keys defensively
persist() writes to localStorage in try/catch and notifies a Set of listeners
uid(prefix) generates ids as prefix + '_' + random base36
Pipeline step kinds observed in seeds: generate (with presetId), edit (with prompt), adopt (with to:'system'/'project' and tags) — the header also documents mask and filter kinds
materialize maps a preset's body→prompt and copies the generation params into a GenerateOptions shape
API is the same store shape as other studio stores: snapshot/subscribe/list/add/update/remove
standouts: The seed prompt bodies hard-encode ConceptV brand aesthetics (cream/gold/ink, warm Australian light, sandstone) directly into preset content
Pipelines compose presets by reference (step.presetId) rather than duplicating their options — a reference, not a copy
materialize is the single bridge from a stored preset to the cvOpenAI.generateImage option shape
conventions: Observable localStorage store pattern (NS key, load/persist, listeners Set, snapshot/subscribe) shared with image-store.js and openai.js
Seeds provide useful defaults out of the box; user data overrides seeds
IIFE with a single window.* export
Deep-clones seeds via JSON parse/stringify to avoid shared mutable references
concerns: header documents 'mask' and 'filter' step kinds but no seed exercises them and this file does not validate step.kind — handling lives in the consumer
Brand aesthetic is encoded as literal prompt text in each seed rather than composed from a single brand-voice/style home (the openai.js BRAND_SUFFIX is a separate place the style also lives)
notes: The preset+pipeline store for AI Studio: six branded image presets, two pipelines, full CRUD over localStorage, and materialize() to turn a preset into generateImage options.
questions: Where are pipeline steps (generate/edit/mask/filter/adopt) executed, and is step.kind validated there?
Should the per-preset brand styling be composed from the same single style home as openai.js BRAND_SUFFIX rather than inlined in each seed body?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — header describes a store for presets and pipelines with the listed step kinds, and the file implements exactly that store plus seeds and materialize.
apparent_themes: Single observable store per concern (localStorage + listeners)
Resolve/materialize a stored config into a runtime call shape
intention_signals: Trying to give AI Studio reusable, named generation recipes and multi-step pipelines so users start with branded presets and can chain generate/edit/adopt steps, with one observable store the UI subscribes to.
novelty: The pipeline abstraction — ordered, typed steps (generate/edit/mask/filter/adopt) that reference presets and end in an 'adopt into system/project' move tying generation back into the shared image library.
contribution: Contributes the AI image preset/pipeline data layer: the GenerateOptions preset shape, the typed multi-step pipeline model, six branded seed presets, two seed pipelines, CRUD+observable store, and materialize() into generateImage options.
summary_for_embedding: A localStorage-backed observable store (cvAIPresets) of named image-generation presets and ordered multi-step pipelines, with CRUD, seeds, and a materialize() that resolves a preset into cvOpenAI.generateImage options.
intention_for_embedding: To give AI Studio reusable branded generation recipes and chainable pipelines from one observable store, so generation parameters are defined once and referenced everywhere.
